```{r figure S2 function}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(here)
library(dplyr)

process_file_variance <- function(filepath, direction_label) {
  df <- as_tibble(fread(here(filepath)))

  # define microarray and RNAseq individual signature columns
  microarray_cols <- colnames(df)[2:7]
  rnaseq_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df)[2:(ncol(df) - 2)], microarray_cols)

  # compute row-wise variance for each technology
  df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Microarray = apply(as.matrix(dplyr::select(., all_of(microarray_cols))), 1, var, na.rm = TRUE),
    RNAseq     = apply(as.matrix(dplyr::select(., all_of(rnaseq_cols))), 1, var, na.rm = TRUE),
    Direction  = direction_label
  )

  # reshape to tidy format
  df %>%
    dplyr::select(Description, Microarray, RNAseq, Direction) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Microarray, RNAseq), names_to = "Technology", values_to = "Variance")
}
```

```{r figure S2 plotting}
plot_var_df_up <- process_file_variance("figures/figure2/figure2a/marray_rnaseq_asinh_up_pathways.tsv", "Upregulated")
plot_var_df_dn <- process_file_variance("figures/figure2/figure2b/marray_rnaseq_asinh_dn_pathways.tsv", "Downregulated")

# combine both into one dataframe
combined_var_plot_df <- bind_rows(plot_var_df_up, plot_var_df_dn) %>%
  mutate(Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated")))

# compute medians for label annotations
med_var_labels <- combined_var_plot_df %>%
  group_by(Direction, Technology) %>%
  summarise(
    Variance = median(Variance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pdf(here("figures/figure3/FigureS3_variance_across_signatures.pdf"),
    width = 16, height = 12)  

ggplot(combined_var_plot_df, aes(x = Technology, y = Variance, fill = Technology)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = after_stat(format(y, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3))),
    vjust = -0.5,
    size = 6,   
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  labs(
    title = "Log-transformed variance across individual signatures",
    y = "Variance (log10 scale)",
    x = "Technology"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Direction) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +   
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, hjust = 0.5), 
    axis.title = element_text(size = 22),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 18),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 20)  
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

dev.off()

```
